trans-unit.source: The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog.
trans-unit.target: De snelle bruine vos springt over de luie hond.

trans-unit.source: This document describes the technical specifications for the new product line.
All measurements are in millimetres unless stated otherwise.
Please refer to the appendix for additional information.
trans-unit.target: Raadpleeg de bijlage voor aanvullende informatie.

trans-unit.source: The project was completed ahead of schedule.
Quality assurance testing revealed no critical defects.
trans-unit.target: Kwaliteitsborgingstests hebben geen kritieke gebreken aan het licht gebracht.

trans-unit.source: The final report will be submitted by Friday.
For further questions, please contact the project manager.
